text: Create an open source release checklist for repository readiness
description: Add a lightweight checklist covering docs, startup verification, repo hygiene, optional integrations, and local project workflow. This provides a concrete definition of done for the release-prep phase.

reflections.context: Turn the release-prep note into an actionable open source publishability checklist that can guide remaining work.
reflections.outcome: Rewrote meta/preparing-for-release.md into a checklist with explicit completed and pending items across onboarding docs, .bowman clarity, startup, ports, repo metadata, and optional integrations.
reflections.effectiveness: Using the existing release note as the base worked well because it preserved the high-level decisions while making remaining gaps visible.
reflections.lesson: When a strategy note starts driving execution, convert it into a checklist early so the team can distinguish finished work from assumptions.
reflections.pattern: This matches earlier repo-readiness work where the highest leverage came from making implicit standards explicit.

status.comment: Turned meta/preparing-for-release.md into a concrete publishability checklist with explicit done/pending items for docs, startup, port robustness, repo hygiene, and optional integrations.
